category_sources: source_facts.description says cargo-docset is a Cargo subcommand to generate Dash/Zeal docsets for Rust packages.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Robzz/cargo-docset repository.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo is the official Robzz/cargo-docset repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; no dedicated documentation URL is supplied in source_facts, so the official README is the best documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/Robzz/cargo-docset, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly mentions Cargo, Dash/Zeal docset generation, and Rust packages.
